topic.title: INFO 7375 — Finals Presentations — Your Group, Date & Time
topic.text:
Hi everyone,

Finals presentations will take place over the next two Saturdays. You've been divided alphabetically by last name into two groups. Find your name below and note your date and presentation time. Each presentation is 12 minutes.

Group 1 — Saturday, April 18, 2026

12:00 — Ankit Deopurkar 12:14 — Mithran Ezhilarasan 12:28 — Harsh Gujarati 12:42 — Yingjie Hong 12:56 — Swara Joshi 1:10 — Sai Manasa Karanam 1:24 — Karthik Kashyap

1:36 – 1:51 BREAK

1:51 — Arjun Kavungal 2:05 — Myclineshareena Kennedy 2:19 — Manav Kheni 2:33 — Shreya Kini 2:47 — Pratiksha Mohod 3:01 — Minal Naranje

Group 2 — Saturday, April 25, 2026

12:00 — Vivek Nikam 12:14 — Janhavi Patil 12:28 — Rupam Patra 12:42 — Abhishek Prakash 12:56 — Rajat Puli 1:10 — Dhyeykumar Rabadiya

1:22 – 1:37 BREAK

1:37 — Gunashree Rajakumar 1:51 — Aravind Ravi 2:05 — Manisha Sahu 2:19 — Ishaan Samel 2:33 — Deepa Shenoy 2:47 — Ananya Thathigowdara

Please review the finals prep guide here: https://ninaharris.co/talks/info-7375-week-1/finals-prep

Both groups are expected to attend both Saturdays. On the Saturday you are not presenting, you'll be in the audience — your attention matters.

If you have a conflict with your assigned date or time, reach out to me before April 14 and we'll figure it out.

— Prof. Nik & Nina
